name: Herman Whole-Wheat Sourdough Applesauce Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Herman sourdough starter; see note
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill Preparation Time: 1:20
Cream together the sugars, honey, butter, shortening, and salt until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly. Stir in Herman starter, applesauce, vanilla, and rum flavoring. In another bowl, combine flours, spices, baking soda, and baking powder. Mix well with a wire whisk. Gently fold the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture. Fold in chopped walnuts and raisins if using them. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan or bundt pan. Bake at 350°F for 75-80 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing.
